name: Hawaiian-Portuguese Sweet Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the mashed potatoes, water, lemon extract, lemon peel, sugar, butter, and salt to the mixing bowl.
2. Add the eggs, unbleached flour, yeast, and dough enhancer to the bowl with the wet ingredients.
3. Mix all ingredients thoroughly until a smooth dough forms.
4. Place the dough in a lightly oiled bread pan and cover with plastic wrap.
5. Choose "Basic White Bread" setting on your bread machine.
6. Press "Start."
